sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44164" key="eu)ka/mpeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκάμπ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44164.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flexibility</tr_>, of the body, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:35:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.35.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
